title: Hermes Agent 5.0 (New Upgrades): HERMES BECAME ULTRA-HERMES!
summary: Hermes Agent 0.16 is a major release adding a native desktop application for macOS, Linux, and Windows, an enhanced web dashboard with admin controls, remote gateway support for connecting to remote instances, improved model picker with fuzzy search, and security enhancements including SSRF protection and safer subprocess handling.
